elementary.title: A2 Prepositions of movement: Along, across, over, etc.
elementary.content:
📌 Định nghĩa
Chúng ta dùng giới từ chỉ chuyển động (prepositions of movement) sau các động từ để mô tả hướng hoặc đường đi của chuyển động. Chúng trả lời câu hỏi "đi theo hướng nào?" hay "đi như thế nào?".
📊 Bảng giới từ chuyển động
Giới từNghĩaVí dụ
tođến (điểm đến)She walked to the park.
fromtừ (điểm xuất phát)He came from the library.
intovào trong (không gian kín)She walked into the room.
out ofra ngoài (từ trong ra)The bird flew out of the cage.
uplên (hướng cao hơn)They walked up the hill.
downxuống (hướng thấp hơn)She ran down the stairs.
acrossqua (bề mặt mở: đường, sông)The dog ran across the road.
throughxuyên qua (bên trong: rừng, hầm)We walked through the forest.
overqua phía trên (nhảy qua, bay qua)The cat jumped over the wall.
underchui qua phía dướiThe cat crawled under the fence.
alongdọc theo (đi theo chiều dài)We walked along the river.
aroundvòng quanh (đi vòng)She walked around the lake.
pastđi ngang qua (bên cạnh)We drove past the school.
ontolên trên bề mặtHe jumped onto the table.
offrời khỏi bề mặtShe fell off the bike.
towardsvề phía, hướng đếnHe walked towards the door.
⚠️ Phân biệt hay nhầm lẫn
• across vs through: across = qua bề mặt phẳng, không gian mở (đường phố, sông, sa mạc). through = xuyên qua không gian có chiều sâu (rừng, hầm, phòng).
   We drove across the desert. / We drove through the tunnel.
• over vs across: over = bay/nhảy phía trên. across = đi ngang qua bề mặt.
   The plane flew over the mountains. / She swam across the river.
• into vs to: into = vào trong (nhấn mạnh sự xâm nhập). to = đến (điểm đến).
   She walked into the kitchen. / She drove to the airport.

exercises.q: The children ran ___ the road to catch the bus.
exercises.exp: across = qua bề mặt phẳng (đường phố)

exercises.q: We walked ___ the forest for two hours.
exercises.exp: through = xuyên qua không gian có chiều sâu (rừng)

exercises.q: She fell ___ her bicycle and hurt her knee.
exercises.exp: off = rời khỏi bề mặt (xe đạp)

exercises.q: He climbed ___ the fence to get the ball.
exercises.exp: over = nhảy qua phía trên

exercises.q: We strolled ___ the beach and watched the sunset.
exercises.exp: along = dọc theo (bãi biển)

exercises.q: The train went ___ the tunnel under the mountain.
exercises.exp: through = xuyên qua (hầm)

exercises.q: She got ___ the car and drove away.
exercises.exp: into = vào trong (ô tô)

exercises.q: The cat jumped ___ the table to look outside.
exercises.exp: onto = lên bề mặt (bàn)

exercises.q: They walked ___ the park three times.
exercises.exp: around = đi vòng quanh

exercises.q: He ran ___ the stairs to answer the door.
exercises.exp: up = lên (cầu thang)

exercises.q: We drove ___ the school and saw the children playing.
exercises.exp: past = đi ngang qua bên cạnh

exercises.q: The bird flew ___ the cage when I opened the door.
exercises.exp: out of = ra ngoài (từ trong ra)

exercises.q: She walked ___ the hill and enjoyed the view.
exercises.exp: down = xuống (đồi)

exercises.q: The plane flew ___ the mountains on its way to Rome.
exercises.exp: over = bay phía trên

exercises.q: He crawled ___ the low fence to reach the garden.
exercises.exp: under = chui qua phía dưới

exercises.q: She walked ___ the door and said hello.
exercises.exp: towards = về phía, hướng đến

exercises.q: They swam ___ the river to the other side.
exercises.exp: across = qua (sông — bề mặt mở)

exercises.q: The dog ran ___ the path in the park every morning.
exercises.exp: along = dọc theo (con đường)

exercises.q: He jumped ___ the puddle so his shoes wouldn't get wet.
exercises.exp: over = nhảy qua phía trên

exercises.q: She fell ___ the pool when she slipped.
exercises.exp: into = vào trong (bể bơi)

exercises.q: The children ran ___ the road to catch the bus.
exercises.exp: across = qua bề mặt phẳng

exercises.q: We walked ___ the tunnel and came out the other side.
exercises.exp: through = xuyên qua

exercises.q: She walked ___ the stairs to her bedroom.
exercises.exp: up = lên

exercises.q: The cat jumped ___ the wall and landed in the garden.
exercises.exp: over = nhảy qua phía trên

exercises.q: He got ___ the bus and walked home.
exercises.exp: off = rời khỏi (xe buýt)

exercises.q: We strolled ___ the riverbank and enjoyed the fresh air.
exercises.exp: along = dọc theo

exercises.q: She drove ___ the town centre on her way to work.
exercises.exp: through = xuyên qua (trung tâm)

exercises.q: He climbed ___ the tree to get the kite.
exercises.exp: up = leo lên

exercises.q: They swam ___ the lake in the summer heat.
exercises.exp: across = qua hồ

exercises.q: The dog ran ___ the yard and barked at the fence.
exercises.exp: around = vòng quanh

exercises.q: She walked ___ the door and left without saying goodbye.
exercises.exp: out of = ra khỏi

exercises.q: He jumped ___ the puddle so he wouldn't get wet.
exercises.exp: over = nhảy qua

exercises.q: We drove ___ the old school where I used to study.
exercises.exp: past = đi ngang qua

exercises.q: She got ___ the taxi and paid the driver.
exercises.exp: out of = ra khỏi (taxi)

exercises.q: The plane flew ___ the clouds and landed safely.
exercises.exp: through = xuyên qua (mây)

exercises.q: He walked ___ the hill towards the village below.
exercises.exp: down = xuống đồi

exercises.q: She stepped ___ the stage to receive her award.
exercises.exp: onto = bước lên bề mặt

exercises.q: We ran ___ the park and sat by the fountain.
exercises.exp: through = chạy xuyên qua công viên

exercises.q: The ball rolled ___ the table and hit the floor.
exercises.exp: off = rơi khỏi bề mặt

exercises.q: He walked ___ the room to shake hands with the guests.
exercises.exp: towards = hướng về phía

reorder.words: The children ran across the road to the park
She walked through the forest on her own
He climbed over the fence to get the ball back
We strolled along the beach at sunset
The train went through the tunnel under the hill
She got into the car and drove away quickly
The cat jumped off the table and ran away
They walked around the lake for an hour
He ran up the stairs to answer the door
We drove past the school and saw the students
The bird flew out of the cage and into the sky
She walked down the hill towards the village
The plane flew over the mountains at night
He crawled under the fence to reach the other side
They swam across the river to the other bank
She stepped onto the stage to receive her prize
He jumped over the puddle so his shoes stayed dry
We walked towards the lighthouse on the cliff
The dog ran around the garden barking loudly
She came out of the shop carrying many bags

passage.text: Last Saturday, my family went for a hike. We drove {{1}} the countryside and parked near a river. First, we walked {{2}} a long bridge that crossed the river. Then we went {{3}} a dark forest. The path led us {{4}} a steep hill. At the top, we could see everything below. We walked {{5}} the hilltop and found a perfect picnic spot. After lunch, we climbed {{6}} the hill and went {{7}} a small stream. Finally, we walked {{8}} the road back to the car, passing {{9}} a small farm. We jumped {{10}} the car and drove home, tired but happy.

Anna's morning commute is always an adventure. She walks {{1}} her house and turns left. She walks {{2}} the main road, passing {{3}} the old market. Then she goes {{4}} the underpass — it's quicker than crossing {{5}} the bridge. She comes {{6}} the underpass and walks {{7}} the park. She sometimes jogs {{8}} the fountain in the centre. Then she climbs {{9}} the steps to the office building and gets {{10}} the lift.

The rescue team had a difficult mission. They drove {{1}} the mountains in heavy rain. They had to go {{2}} a narrow tunnel. When they came {{3}} the tunnel, they could see the river below. They walked {{4}} the riverbank looking for the missing hikers. They found footprints going {{5}} a muddy hill. They climbed {{6}} the hill carefully. At the top, they saw a group of people walking {{7}} the forest. The team ran {{8}} the field and shouted. The hikers walked {{9}} them happily. Everyone got {{10}} the rescue vehicle and returned to safety.

Tom's cat is always causing trouble. Yesterday it jumped {{1}} the kitchen counter and knocked things off. Then it ran {{2}} the hallway, {{3}} the living room, and straight {{4}} the cat flap. Tom followed it {{5}} the garden, but the cat had already climbed {{6}} the garden wall. Tom walked {{7}} the wall looking for a way out. Finally he saw the cat sitting {{8}} the fence. It jumped {{9}} the fence on its own and walked calmly {{10}} the house.

During our city tour, the guide led us {{1}} many interesting streets. We walked {{2}} an old covered market. Then we crossed {{3}} a famous old bridge. We went {{4}} a beautiful park and stopped to rest. After that, we walked {{5}} a tunnel under the old town wall. We came {{6}} the other side and found a lovely square. A small fountain stood in the middle, and people walked {{7}} it taking photos. We climbed {{8}} some steep steps to a viewpoint. We could see the whole city spread out {{9}} us. At the end, we got {{10}} our tour bus and drove back to the hotel.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả đường đi từ nhà bạn đến trường, siêu thị hoặc nơi làm việc của bạn. Sử dụng ít nhất 6 giới từ chuyển động khác nhau và mô tả chi tiết những gì bạn thấy trên đường đi (đi ngang qua đâu, qua cầu nào, băng qua đường ở đâu...).
writing_prompts.example: Every morning I walk out of my apartment building and turn left. I walk along the main road for about five minutes, passing past a small coffee shop. Then I go across a pedestrian bridge over the canal. After that, I walk through a small park and enjoy the fresh air. I turn right and walk up a few steps into my office building. The whole journey takes about fifteen minutes.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một chuyến đi bộ trong thiên nhiên hoặc một chuyến du lịch mà bạn đã trải qua. Mô tả chi tiết các chuyển động: bạn đã đi qua đâu, leo lên đâu, băng qua gì, đi dọc theo con đường nào. Dùng ít nhất 7 giới từ chuyển động.
writing_prompts.example: Last summer, my friends and I went hiking in the mountains. We drove through a small village and parked the car. Then we walked along a narrow path through a pine forest. We climbed up a steep hill and had to jump over a small stream. At the top, we could see the valley below. We walked across an open field and past a beautiful waterfall. On the way back, we went down a different path and through a meadow full of wildflowers.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một chuyến tham quan thành phố hay một cuộc phiêu lưu trong thành phố. Bạn đã đi đến đâu, qua đâu, băng qua những chỗ nào? Dùng nhiều giới từ chuyển động và mô tả khung cảnh xung quanh.
writing_prompts.example: During our city tour, we started by walking along the river and admiring the view. Then we crossed across a beautiful stone bridge and went through the old market where we bought souvenirs. We walked past several historical buildings and stopped to take photos. We climbed up to a viewpoint and could see the whole city. Afterwards, we went into a museum and learned about the history. We walked around the main square before getting onto a tram to go back to our hotel.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể lại một tình huống khẩn cấp hoặc hồi hộp (chạy trốn khỏi mưa, tìm đường trong thành phố lạ, cứu con vật...). Sử dụng các giới từ chuyển động để miêu tả sinh động các hành động.
writing_prompts.example: One afternoon, the sky turned dark and it started to rain heavily. We ran out of the café and looked for shelter. We ran across the street, dodging cars. I jumped over a big puddle and nearly fell. We ran through a narrow alley and ducked into a bookshop doorway. My friend climbed up the steps to a covered walkway. We rushed past other people who were also looking for cover. Finally, we went into a large shopping centre and laughed about our wet adventure.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả hành trình của một nhân vật trong câu chuyện (thám tử, nhà thám hiểm, anh hùng...) khi họ di chuyển để hoàn thành nhiệm vụ. Dùng ít nhất 8 giới từ chuyển động khác nhau.
writing_prompts.example: The detective moved carefully through the dark streets. She crept past the guard and climbed over the iron gate. Inside, she ran along a long corridor towards the locked room. She crawled under a laser beam and slipped through a narrow gap in the wall. She went into the room and found the missing documents. She ran across the rooftop to escape, jumped down onto a lower roof, and climbed down a fire escape. Finally she rushed out of the building and into the waiting car.

elementary.title: A2 On time vs In time, At the end vs In the end
elementary.content:
📌 Định nghĩa
Các cụm giới từ on time / in time và at the end / in the end thường bị nhầm lẫn vì trông giống nhau nhưng có nghĩa hoàn toàn khác nhau.
🟢 On time — Đúng giờ (punctual)
• On time = đúng giờ theo lịch trình, đúng thời điểm được hẹn/dự kiến. (= punctually, according to schedule)
• Thường dùng với tàu/xe/máy bay, cuộc họp, hẹn giờ cụ thể.
   The train arrived on time. ✔ (đúng giờ theo lịch trình)
   The meeting started on time. ✔
   Please be there on time. ✔
🔵 In time — Kịp lúc (not too late)
• In time = kịp lúc, không quá muộn. (= soon enough, not too late)
• Ngụ ý có thể đã sắp muộn nhưng vẫn còn kịp. Thường dùng với for + danh từ hoặc to + động từ.
   We arrived just in time for the show. ✔ (kịp lúc để xem)
   She got there in time to say goodbye. ✔
   Luckily, the doctor arrived in time. ✔ (kịp cứu bệnh nhân)
🟡 At the end — Vào lúc kết thúc (a point in time)
• At the end = vào lúc kết thúc của thứ gì đó (một sự kiện, bộ phim, cuốn sách, tháng...)
• Theo sau thường là of + danh từ.
   The players shook hands at the end of the match. ✔
   We will discuss questions at the end of the class. ✔
   At the end of the film, the hero wins. ✔
🟣 In the end — Cuối cùng (finally/eventually)
• In the end = cuối cùng, rốt cuộc. Chỉ kết quả sau nhiều sự cố hoặc suy nghĩ. (= finally, eventually — ≠ at first)
• Có thể đứng đầu câu hoặc giữa câu (theo sau là dấu phẩy khi đứng đầu).
   In the end, we decided to stay home. ✔
   We tried many solutions, and in the end it worked. ✔
   In the end, everything was fine. ✔
📊 Bảng tổng hợp
Cụm từNghĩaVí dụ
on timeđúng giờ (theo lịch)The bus arrived on time.
in timekịp lúc (không muộn)We arrived in time for dinner.
at the endvào lúc kết thúc (+ of)At the end of the film, she cried.
in the endcuối cùng (rốt cuộc)In the end, we solved the problem.

exercises.q: The train was late. It didn't arrive ___.
exercises.opts: in time,in the end,on time,at the end
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ theo lịch trình

exercises.q: We ran to the cinema but we arrived just ___ for the film.
exercises.opts: on time,in the end,at the end,in time
exercises.exp: in time for = kịp lúc để xem

exercises.q: ___ of the match, the players shook hands.
exercises.opts: In time,In the end,On time,At the end
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào lúc kết thúc của

exercises.q: We had many problems, but ___ everything worked out fine.
exercises.opts: at the end,on time,in time,in the end
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng (sau nhiều khó khăn)

exercises.q: Please arrive ___ — the meeting starts at 9 am sharp.
exercises.opts: in time,in the end,at the end,on time
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ theo lịch

exercises.q: The doctor arrived just ___ to save the patient.
exercises.opts: on time,at the end,in the end,in time
exercises.exp: in time = kịp lúc (nguy cơ quá muộn)

exercises.q: ___ of the year, we review our goals.
exercises.opts: In the end,In time,On time,At the end
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối (thời điểm)

exercises.q: She couldn't decide which job to take, but ___ she chose the one in Paris.
exercises.opts: at the end,on time,in time,in the end
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng, rốt cuộc

exercises.q: The bus came ___ so nobody missed their connection.
exercises.opts: in the end,at the end,in time,on time
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ theo lịch

exercises.q: I woke up late but I got ___ to have breakfast before work.
exercises.opts: on time,at the end,in the end,in time
exercises.exp: in time = kịp lúc

exercises.q: ___ the course, students take a final exam.
exercises.opts: In time,In the end,On time,At the end of
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối khóa học

exercises.q: We debated for hours and ___ agreed to take a break.
exercises.opts: at the end,in time,on time,in the end
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng (sau cuộc tranh luận)

exercises.q: His flight departed ___, which was a relief.
exercises.opts: in the end,in time,at the end,on time
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ (chuyến bay)

exercises.q: Hurry up! We need to get there ___ to get good seats.
exercises.opts: on time,at the end,in the end,in time
exercises.exp: in time = kịp lúc để có chỗ tốt

exercises.q: ___ the story, the prince and princess lived happily.
exercises.opts: In time,In the end,On time,At the end of
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối câu chuyện

exercises.q: I thought I would miss the flight, but ___ everything was fine.
exercises.opts: at the end,on time,in time,in the end
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng (kết quả)

exercises.q: The project was submitted ___, exactly as planned.
exercises.opts: in time,in the end,at the end,on time
exercises.exp: on time = đúng hạn theo kế hoạch

exercises.q: She ran fast and arrived just ___ to catch her train.
exercises.opts: on time,in the end,at the end,in time
exercises.exp: in time = kịp lúc bắt tàu

exercises.q: ___ the meeting, the manager summarised the key points.
exercises.opts: In time,In the end,On time,At the end of
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối buổi họp

exercises.q: We almost gave up, but ___, we found the answer.
exercises.opts: at the end,on time,in time,in the end
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng (sau nhiều cố gắng)

exercises.q: The train arrived ___. Nobody was late.
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ theo lịch

exercises.q: We got there just ___ for the start of the concert.
exercises.exp: in time for = kịp lúc

exercises.q: ___ the film, the audience clapped loudly.
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối bộ phim

exercises.q: We argued a lot, but ___ we agreed on a solution.
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng, rốt cuộc

exercises.q: Please be ___ — the show begins at 7 pm exactly.
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ

exercises.q: She arrived just ___ to say goodbye to her friend.
exercises.exp: in time = kịp lúc

exercises.q: ___ the month, all bills must be paid.
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối tháng

exercises.q: It was difficult, but ___, we succeeded.
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng

exercises.q: The meeting started ___. Everyone was punctual.
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ

exercises.q: Luckily we left early and arrived ___ to get seats.
exercises.exp: in time = kịp lúc

exercises.q: ___ the course, there is a final test.
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối khóa học

exercises.q: She hesitated for a long time but ___ said yes.
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng

exercises.q: Was the delivery ___? It was supposed to come at noon.
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ theo hẹn

exercises.q: We rushed to the station and got there just ___.
exercises.exp: in time = vừa kịp

exercises.q: ___ the match, the referee blew the whistle.
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối trận đấu

exercises.q: We tried many solutions and ___ found one that worked.
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng

exercises.q: The doctor arrived ___ to save the patient's life.
exercises.exp: in time = kịp lúc (nguy hiểm)

exercises.q: My flight departed ___. I was happy about that.
exercises.exp: on time = đúng giờ (chuyến bay)

exercises.q: ___ the book, everything is explained clearly.
exercises.exp: at the end of = vào cuối cuốn sách

exercises.q: Nobody wanted to quit, and ___ they won the competition.
exercises.exp: in the end = cuối cùng

reorder.words: The train arrived on time this morning
We got there just in time for the show
At the end of the film the hero wins
In the end we decided to stay at home
Please arrive on time the meeting starts at nine
She ran fast and arrived in time to catch the bus
At the end of the year we review our goals together
We had many problems but in the end it worked
The bus came on time so nobody missed their train
She got there in time to have breakfast before work
At the end of the course there is a final exam
They argued for hours and in the end agreed on a plan
His flight departed on time which was a big relief
We rushed but arrived just in time to see the opening act
At the end of the match the players shook hands
I thought I would be late but in the end everything was fine
The project was submitted on time as planned by everyone
She arrived just in time to say goodbye to her friend
At the end of the meeting the manager gave a summary
We almost gave up but in the end we found the answer

passage.text: Yesterday was a stressful day. My alarm didn't go off, so I woke up late. I rushed to get ready because I had a job interview. I was worried I wouldn't arrive {{1}}. I ran to the bus stop, but the bus was {{2}} — it was already gone. I called a taxi. {{3}}, the taxi came quickly. I arrived at the company just {{4}} — only two minutes before the interview started. {{5}} the interview, the manager asked me many questions. I was nervous {{6}}, but {{7}}, I relaxed. {{8}} the session, they said they would contact me. {{9}}, they called me that same evening to offer me the job!

Our school play was last Friday. We rehearsed for weeks. Everyone was nervous about being {{1}}. The show was supposed to start at 7 pm, and {{2}} all the actors were ready. My friend Tom almost missed it — he had car trouble but arrived just {{3}} to put on his costume. {{4}} the first act, everyone felt more confident. There were a few small mistakes, but {{5}}, the performance was wonderful. {{6}} the show, the audience stood up and clapped. The director thanked everyone for always arriving {{7}} to rehearsals.

Planning a surprise party is always stressful. We started organising weeks before the event. {{1}}, we couldn't agree on a venue. We visited many places and {{2}}, we found the perfect restaurant. We ordered food and decorations — everything arrived {{3}}, which was a relief. On the day, some guests were {{4}} and some arrived {{5}}, even after the birthday girl! {{6}} the evening, we gave a speech. It was a wonderful night. {{7}}, everything worked out perfectly, even though it seemed impossible at first.

Maria had a very important exam. She studied hard but was worried she hadn't prepared enough. She set two alarms to make sure she would get up {{1}}. On the day, she woke up early and arrived at school {{2}} — even fifteen minutes before the exam started. She had time to review her notes. {{3}} the exam, the teacher collected the papers. {{4}}, all that preparation paid off — she passed with a high score. She was so relieved. She also got to school {{5}} every day after that.

The football match last Sunday was unforgettable. The home team started badly. {{1}}, they were losing three-nil. But they kept trying. Then they scored one goal, then another. The crowd went wild. {{2}} the match, the score was three-three. Then in extra time, the home team scored again. {{3}}, they won four-three. Nobody could believe it. The players ran {{4}} to the crowd to celebrate. The fans who had almost left during half-time were so glad they stayed {{5}} the end.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một lần bạn suýt bỏ lỡ điều gì đó (chuyến tàu, buổi hòa nhạc, buổi phỏng vấn...) nhưng vẫn đến kịp. Dùng cả 'on time' và 'in time' trong bài viết và mô tả cảm xúc của bạn.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: On time vs In time, At the end vs In the end
hint_words: in the end everything was fine
at the end of the platform
writing_prompts.example: Last month, I almost missed my train to Ho Chi Minh City for a job interview. I overslept and woke up an hour late. I rushed to the station, hoping the train was not on time for once. I ran along the platform and jumped onto the last carriage just in time — the doors closed behind me. At the end of the journey, I arrived at the interview location with five minutes to spare. In the end, the interview went well and I got the job. I was so relieved!

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một kế hoạch hoặc dự án mà ban đầu gặp nhiều khó khăn nhưng cuối cùng thành công. Dùng 'in the end' để mô tả kết quả và 'at the end of' để chỉ thời điểm kết thúc.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: On time vs In time, At the end vs In the end
hint_words: at the end of each week
at the end of the project
writing_prompts.example: Last semester, our class had to complete a group project about climate change. At first, everything went wrong. We couldn't agree on the topic, and some members didn't do their part on time. At the end of each week, we had a team meeting to check progress. There were many arguments. We almost gave up twice. But in the end, we worked together and finished the project. At the end of the presentation, our teacher gave us the highest mark in the class. It was worth all the effort.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một ngày bận rộn điển hình của bạn, trong đó bạn phải đến đúng giờ cho nhiều việc khác nhau (lớp học, cuộc họp, gặp bạn bè...). Có chuyện gì đó không diễn ra theo kế hoạch không? Và 'in the end' kết quả như thế nào?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: On time vs In time, At the end vs In the end
hint_words: had to be on time for class
at the end of the day
writing_prompts.example: Last Thursday was one of my busiest days. I had to be on time for an 8 am English class, then meet a client at noon, and see a friend in the evening. The bus was on time so I arrived at school in time to review my notes before the lesson. The client meeting ran late, so I arrived just in time for my next appointment. At the end of the day, I had a quick dinner with my friend. In the end, everything went smoothly and I felt tired but very satisfied.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một lễ kỷ niệm hoặc sự kiện quan trọng (đám cưới, buổi tốt nghiệp, cuộc thi...). Điều gì xảy ra ở cuối sự kiện? Và cuối cùng (in the end) mọi người cảm thấy thế nào?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: On time vs In time, At the end vs In the end
hint_words: at the end of the ceremony
in the end it was wonderful
at the end of the reception
arrived just in time to see
in the end everyone was happy
writing_prompts.example: My cousin's wedding last spring was beautiful. The ceremony started on time at two o'clock, and all the guests arrived in time to find their seats. At the end of the ceremony, everyone cried happy tears. The reception started a little late, but in the end, nobody minded because the food was delicious. At the end of the evening, the couple cut the wedding cake and everyone danced. In the end, it was a perfect day that everyone will remember for a long time.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một chuyến đi hay chuyến tham quan mà mọi thứ không diễn ra như kế hoạch ban đầu. Dùng 'on time', 'in time', 'at the end of' và 'in the end' để kể câu chuyện.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: On time vs In time, At the end vs In the end
hint_words: we almost didn't make it in time
at the end of the tour
in the end we laughed about it
at the end of the day
in the end it was memorable
writing_prompts.example: Last year, I went on a day trip with my friends to a nearby national park. The bus wasn't on time, so we started worrying. We almost didn't make it in time for the guided tour. Luckily, the guide waited for us and we joined the group just in time. During the trip, it started raining, but we kept going. At the end of the tour, the ranger showed us a beautiful viewpoint above the clouds. At the end of the day, we were soaked and exhausted. In the end, we all laughed about it — it was the most memorable trip we had ever taken.

elementary.title: A2 Asking questions in English: Question forms
elementary.content:
📌 Công thức tổng quát — QWASM
Khi đặt câu hỏi trong tiếng Anh, trật tự là: QW + A + S + M
  • QW = Question Word (từ để hỏi: what, where, when, who, why, how…) — không có trong câu hỏi Yes/No
  • A = Auxiliary verb (trợ động từ: be, do/does/did, have, modal verbs)
  • S = Subject (chủ ngữ)
  • M = Main verb (động từ chính)
🟢 Câu hỏi Yes/No (Yes-No questions)
• Không có từ để hỏi. Đảo trợ động từ lên trước chủ ngữ.
   She is a student. → Is she a student? ✔
   You like football. → Do you like football? ✔
   They can swim. → Can they swim? ✔
   He has finished. → Has he finished? ✔
🔵 Câu hỏi Wh- (Wh- questions)
• Có từ để hỏi đứng đầu câu, theo sau là trợ động từ + chủ ngữ + động từ chính.
   Where do you live? | What is her name? | Why did he leave?
   How can I help you? | When does the train leave?
• be làm động từ chính: đứng trước chủ ngữ như trợ động từ: Where is she?
• Have got (chỉ có thì hiện tại): Have you got a pen? / What have you got?
• Các dạng have khác (have lunch/dinner/a bath) cần dùng do/does/did: Do you have lunch at home?
🟡 Từ để hỏi mở rộng (How + adjective)
Chúng ta có thể dùng how + tính từ/trạng từ để hỏi về mức độ:
Dạng hỏiHỏi vềVí dụ
How muchgiá cả / số lượng (không đếm được)How much does it cost?
How manysố lượng (đếm được)How many students are there?
How longthời gian / chiều dàiHow long does the film last?
How oftentần suấtHow often do you go to the gym?
How farkhoảng cáchHow far is the station?
How oldtuổiHow old is she?

exercises.q: ___ does she live? — In London.
exercises.exp: Where = hỏi nơi chốn

exercises.q: ___ does the film start? — At 8 pm.
exercises.exp: When = hỏi thời gian

exercises.q: ___ do you go to the gym? — Twice a week.
exercises.exp: How often = hỏi tần suất

exercises.q: ___ is your teacher? — Ms. Anna.
exercises.exp: Who = hỏi người

exercises.q: ___ does this bag cost? — Fifty dollars.
exercises.exp: How much = hỏi giá tiền

exercises.q: ___ did you leave early? — Because I was tired.
exercises.exp: Why = hỏi lý do

exercises.q: ___ students are in your class? — Twenty.
exercises.exp: How many = hỏi số lượng (đếm được)

exercises.q: ___ does the journey take? — About three hours.
exercises.exp: How long = hỏi thời gian kéo dài

exercises.q: ___ you like coffee? — Yes, I do.
exercises.exp: Do you = câu hỏi Yes/No hiện tại

exercises.q: ___ she working right now? — No, she isn't.
exercises.exp: Is she (+ -ing) = hiện tại tiếp diễn

exercises.q: What ___ he do for work? — He's a nurse.
exercises.exp: What does he do = hỏi nghề nghiệp

exercises.q: Where ___ you go last night?
exercises.exp: Where did you go = quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ is the nearest supermarket? — About two kilometres.
exercises.exp: How far = hỏi khoảng cách

exercises.q: ___ have you got in your bag? — My wallet and some keys.
exercises.exp: What have you got = hỏi vật (have got)

exercises.q: How old ___ your parents?
exercises.exp: How old are = dùng be với tuổi

exercises.q: ___ you ever been to Japan? — Yes, once.
exercises.exp: Have you ever been = present perfect

exercises.q: What ___ she studying at university?
exercises.exp: What is she studying = hiện tại tiếp diễn

exercises.q: ___ can I help you today?
exercises.exp: How can I help = modal verb + cách thức

exercises.q: Which colour ___ you prefer, red or blue?
exercises.exp: Which do you prefer = câu hỏi có lựa chọn

exercises.q: Where ___ the meeting tomorrow?
exercises.exp: Where is = be làm động từ chính

exercises.q: ___ does the train leave? — At 6:30.
exercises.exp: When = hỏi thời gian

exercises.q: ___ does she work? — At a hospital.
exercises.exp: Where = hỏi nơi chốn

exercises.q: ___ did you go there? — Because I wanted to.
exercises.exp: Why = hỏi lý do

exercises.q: ___ is her favourite actor? — Leonardo DiCaprio.
exercises.exp: Who = hỏi người

exercises.q: ___ often do you exercise? — Every day.
exercises.exp: How often = tần suất

exercises.q: What ___ she doing now? — She's cooking.
exercises.exp: What is she doing = hiện tại tiếp diễn

exercises.q: ___ much does this jacket cost?
exercises.exp: How much = hỏi giá

exercises.q: Where ___ he born? — In Tokyo.
exercises.exp: Where was = be quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ many people were at the party?
exercises.exp: How many = hỏi số lượng

exercises.q: What ___ you do last weekend?
exercises.exp: What did you do = quá khứ đơn

exercises.q: ___ long does it take to get there?
exercises.exp: How long = hỏi thời gian kéo dài

exercises.q: ___ you speak Spanish? — Yes, a little.
exercises.exp: Do/Can you = câu hỏi Yes/No

exercises.q: What ___ they talking about?
exercises.exp: What are they talking = hiện tại tiếp diễn

exercises.q: ___ far is it to the airport?
exercises.exp: How far = hỏi khoảng cách

exercises.q: Have you ___ seen that film? — No, never.
exercises.exp: Have you ever = present perfect

exercises.q: ___ old is your grandfather?
exercises.exp: How old = hỏi tuổi

exercises.q: What time ___ the shop open? — At nine.
exercises.exp: What time does = present simple

exercises.q: ___ she at home yesterday? — No, she wasn't.
exercises.exp: Was she = be quá khứ Yes/No

exercises.q: ___ colour do you prefer?
exercises.exp: Which = hỏi khi có lựa chọn

exercises.q: ___ you ever tried Vietnamese food?
exercises.exp: Have you = present perfect Yes/No

reorder.words: Where does she work every day
When did you arrive at the hotel
How often do you go to the gym
What is she studying at university
How much does this jacket cost
Why did he leave the meeting early
How many students are in the class
Have you ever been to Italy
What time does the train leave tomorrow
Who is your favourite singer right now
How long does it take to get there
Which colour does she prefer red or blue
How far is the station from here
Can they swim in the ocean safely
What did you do last weekend with friends
Where was she born and where did she grow up
How old are your parents now
What have you got in your bag today
Is she working at the office today
Why are they laughing so loudly over there

passage.text: I am writing an article about healthy habits. First, I need to ask some people some questions. {{1}} often do you exercise? {{2}} kind of food do you eat? {{3}} you drink enough water every day? {{4}} do you usually sleep? {{5}} long do you sleep each night? {{6}} do you usually go to bed? {{7}} you ever tried meditation? {{8}} long have you had these habits? {{9}} affects your health the most? {{10}} your friends have similar habits?

An interviewer is talking to a new employee. {{1}} is your full name? {{2}} are you from originally? {{3}} did you graduate from university? {{4}} did you study? {{5}} did you apply for this job? {{6}} experience do you have? {{7}} you worked in a team before? {{8}} languages do you speak? {{9}} do you see yourself in five years? {{10}} do you usually work — alone or in a team?

Two friends are planning a holiday. Anna: {{1}} we go this year? Beth: How about Thailand? Anna: {{2}} long is the flight? Beth: About ten hours. Anna: {{3}} much do the tickets cost? Beth: Around five hundred dollars. Anna: {{4}} we need a visa? Beth: Yes. Anna: {{5}} long does it take to get one? Beth: About a week. Anna: {{6}} hotels are best? Beth: I read some reviews. Anna: {{7}} you already booked anything? Beth: Not yet. Anna: {{8}} should we go? Beth: In April — it's not too hot. Anna: {{9}} days do you want to stay? Beth: Ten days. Anna: {{10}} we start planning now?

A student is asking her teacher about an assignment. Student: {{1}} is the assignment due? Teacher: Next Friday. Student: {{2}} long should it be? Teacher: About 500 words. Student: {{3}} I use the internet for research? Teacher: Yes. Student: {{4}} sources should I use? Teacher: At least three. Student: {{5}} the assignment in groups or alone? Teacher: Alone this time. Student: {{6}} topics can I write about? Teacher: Anything related to the environment. Student: {{7}} do you want us to submit it? Teacher: By email. Student: {{8}} you have time to check a draft? Teacher: Yes, but send it by Wednesday. Student: {{9}} do we need to include? Teacher: A title, introduction, and conclusion. Student: {{10}} you give us an example?

A tourist is asking for information. Tourist: {{1}} is the museum from here? Officer: About ten minutes on foot. Tourist: {{2}} it open today? Officer: Yes, it closes at six. Tourist: {{3}} much is the entrance fee? Officer: It's free on Sundays. Tourist: {{4}} I get there by bus? Officer: Yes, take bus number seven. Tourist: {{5}} does the bus leave? Officer: Every fifteen minutes. Tourist: {{6}} does the journey take? Officer: About five minutes. Tourist: {{7}} is the best thing to see there? Officer: The ancient art collection. Tourist: {{8}} there a café inside? Officer: Yes, on the ground floor. Tourist: {{9}} languages is the guide in? Officer: English, French, and Spanish. Tourist: {{10}} you recommend any other places nearby?

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết 5-7 câu hỏi mà bạn sẽ hỏi một người nước ngoài bạn mới gặp lần đầu, rồi viết các câu trả lời có thể có của họ. Sử dụng nhiều dạng câu hỏi khác nhau (Yes/No, Wh-, How + adj) với các thì khác nhau.
hint_words: What do you do for work
How long have you been here
What is your favourite thing about
Why did you choose to come here
How many languages do you speak
What are you planning to do next
writing_prompts.example: If I met a foreign visitor, I would ask: Where are you from? What do you do for work? How long have you been in Vietnam? Do you like Vietnamese food? What is your favourite thing about our city? How many countries have you visited? Why did you choose Vietnam? I think the visitor might say they are from France, they work as a photographer, and they have been here for two weeks. They might say they love the food and the friendly people, and that they chose Vietnam because of its beautiful landscapes.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy tưởng tượng bạn là một phóng viên đang phỏng vấn một vận động viên hoặc người nổi tiếng sau một chiến thắng lớn. Viết cuộc phỏng vấn ngắn với ít nhất 6 câu hỏi và câu trả lời.
hint_words: How do you feel right now
How many hours do you practise
Did you ever think of giving up
How long have you been competing
What does this mean to you
How did you prepare for today
writing_prompts.example: Reporter: How do you feel right now after winning? Athlete: I'm incredibly happy. I can't believe it. Reporter: When did you start training for this competition? Athlete: About a year ago. Reporter: How many hours do you practise each day? Athlete: Usually five or six hours. Reporter: Who helped you most? Athlete: My coach, definitely. Reporter: Did you ever think of giving up? Athlete: Yes, once — after an injury. Reporter: What does this victory mean to you? Athlete: Everything. It proves that hard work pays off.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết một cuộc hội thoại giữa hai người đang lên kế hoạch cho một buổi tối đi ăn hoặc xem phim. Dùng nhiều dạng câu hỏi để hỏi về địa điểm, thời gian, sở thích và giá cả.
hint_words: What do you want to do tonight
Do you want to eat first
writing_prompts.example: Lan: What do you want to do tonight? Minh: How about going to the cinema? Lan: Which film do you want to see? Minh: The new action film. Have you seen it yet? Lan: No, I haven't. What time does it start? Minh: At seven. How far is the cinema from here? Lan: About fifteen minutes by bus. Do you want to eat first? Minh: Yes! How much does the food at that pizza place cost? Lan: Around 150,000 dong each. Minh: That sounds good. When should we meet? Lan: How about six o'clock? Minh: Perfect.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết một bài mô tả lần đầu tiên bạn đến thăm một nơi mới (thành phố, đất nước, trường học mới...). Bao gồm ít nhất 5 câu hỏi mà bạn đã hỏi hoặc bạn muốn hỏi ai đó ở đó.
hint_words: What do people usually do here
writing_prompts.example: When I first arrived in Da Lat for university, I was completely lost. I had so many questions. I asked a local student: Where is the nearest supermarket? How do I get to the library? How long does it take to walk there? Is there a bus that goes to the city centre? What time does the cafeteria open? The student was very kind and answered all my questions patiently. She also asked me: Where are you from? How long have you been in Da Lat? It was a good start to my new life.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết một bộ câu hỏi khảo sát về thói quen học tiếng Anh của mọi người (ít nhất 8 câu hỏi), rồi viết câu trả lời của bạn cho mỗi câu hỏi đó.
hint_words: How long have you been learning English
Do you watch films in English
How many new words do you learn a day
Have you ever taken an English exam
Which skill do you find most difficult
writing_prompts.example: English Learning Survey: 1. How long have you been learning English? — About five years. 2. How often do you practise? — Every day. 3. What methods do you use? — Apps, films, and conversation classes. 4. Do you watch films in English? — Yes, with Vietnamese subtitles. 5. How many new words do you learn each day? — Around ten. 6. Have you ever taken an official English exam? — Yes, I took IELTS last year. 7. What is the hardest part for you? — Speaking confidently. 8. Which skill do you find most difficult — speaking, listening, reading, or writing? — Speaking. 9. Where do you usually study? — At home in the evenings. 10. Why are you learning English? — To get a better job.

elementary.title: A2 Subject questions, questions with preposition
elementary.content:
📌 Câu hỏi thông thường (Object questions)
Trong hầu hết câu hỏi, chúng ta hỏi về tân ngữ (object) hoặc phần khác của câu. Khi đó, trật tự là trật tự câu hỏi bình thường: trợ động từ đứng trước chủ ngữ.
   He called Sarah. → Who did he call? (hỏi tân ngữ — Sarah là tân ngữ)
   Music makes me happy. → What does music do?
🟢 Câu hỏi chủ ngữ (Subject questions)
Khi từ để hỏi who / what là chủ ngữ (subject) của câu, chúng ta không dùng trợ động từ do/does/did và không đảo trật tự.

Câu gốcObject questionSubject question
Sarah called Mike.Who did Sarah call? (hỏi Mike)Who called Mike? (hỏi Sarah)
Something happened.—What happened? ✔
Tom broke the window.What did Tom break?Who broke the window?

• Trong hiện tại và quá khứ đơn: subject question không dùng do/does/did.
   ✔ Who broke the window? (NOT: Who did break?)
   ✔ What makes you happy? (NOT: What does make you happy?)
• Với các thì khác (hiện tại tiếp diễn, present perfect...) thì vẫn giữ trợ động từ vì nó là một phần của thì đó.
   ✔ Who is calling? / Who has taken my bag?
🔵 Câu hỏi với giới từ (Questions with preposition)
Khi giới từ là một phần của cấu trúc động từ (talk about, go with, listen to, look at, wait for...), trong tiếng Anh thông thường (informal), giới từ đặt ở cuối câu hỏi.

Câu gốcCâu hỏi (informal)
He went with John.Who did he go with?
We talk about sport.What do you talk about?
She's waiting for Tom.Who is she waiting for?
He's looking at the map.What is he looking at?
I listened to jazz.What did you listen to?

⚠️ Trong văn phong trang trọng (formal), giới từ đặt trước từ để hỏi: With whom did he go? — nhưng dạng này ít dùng trong giao tiếp hàng ngày.

exercises.q: ___ broke the window? — Tom did.
exercises.opts: Who did break,Who does break,Who broke,Who do break
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who + V (không dùng did)

exercises.q: ___ did she call? — She called her sister.
exercises.exp: Object question: Who did she call? (hỏi tân ngữ)

exercises.q: What ___ to your phone? It's cracked.
exercises.exp: Subject question: What happened? (không dùng did)

exercises.q: Who ___ you at the party? — A friend from school.
exercises.exp: Object question: Who did you meet? → met dùng sai → đúng là: Who did you meet? Ans A = dùng did rồi thì met

exercises.q: Who ___ your best friend at school?
exercises.exp: Subject question với be: Who was your best friend?

exercises.q: What ___ at the end of the film? — The hero won.
exercises.exp: Subject question: What happened? (không did)

exercises.q: Who did she go ___ on holiday?
exercises.exp: go with = câu hỏi với giới từ cuối câu

exercises.q: What are they talking ___?
exercises.exp: talk about → giới từ cuối câu hỏi

exercises.q: Who ___ you speak to at the meeting?
exercises.exp: Object question: Who did you speak to? (giới từ ở cuối)

exercises.q: ___ wins the prize gets a trophy.
exercises.exp: Whoever = bất cứ ai (không phải câu hỏi)

exercises.q: What ___ in the news today?
exercises.exp: Subject question: What happened? (không did)

exercises.q: Who ___ you waiting for?
exercises.exp: Who are you waiting for? (wait for — giới từ cuối)

exercises.q: Who ___ she look like? — Her mother.
exercises.exp: Object question: Who does she look like? (look like — giới từ cuối)

exercises.q: What ___ make you happy?
exercises.exp: Subject question: What makes you happy? — nhưng khi dùng 'does': What does make… không đúng. Đây là object question với make

exercises.q: Who ___ the accident? — A lorry driver.
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who caused the accident? (không did)

exercises.q: What music do you usually listen ___?
exercises.exp: listen to → giới từ cuối câu hỏi

exercises.q: Who ___ the email? — The manager did.
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who sent the email? (không did)

exercises.q: Who did he go to the concert ___?
exercises.exp: go with = câu hỏi có giới từ ở cuối

exercises.q: What are you looking ___?
exercises.exp: look at → giới từ cuối câu hỏi

exercises.q: Who ___ the best goal? — The striker.
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who scored? (không did)

exercises.q: Who ___ the window? — Mike did. (break)
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who broke? (không did)

exercises.q: What ___ to your car? It looks damaged.
exercises.exp: Subject question: What happened?

exercises.q: Who did you go on holiday ___?
exercises.exp: go with — giới từ cuối câu hỏi

exercises.q: What are they arguing ___?
exercises.exp: argue about — giới từ cuối câu

exercises.q: Who ___ the best score in the exam?
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who got? (không did)

exercises.q: Who is she talking ___?
exercises.exp: talk to — giới từ cuối câu hỏi

exercises.q: What ___ you think about?
exercises.exp: Object question: What do you think about?

exercises.q: Who ___ the company? — A local businessman.
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who founded? (không did)

exercises.q: What does she usually dream ___?
exercises.exp: dream about — giới từ cuối câu

exercises.q: Who did he play tennis ___?
exercises.exp: play with — giới từ cuối câu hỏi

exercises.q: What ___ at the concert? — It was amazing!
exercises.exp: Subject question: What happened?

exercises.q: Who are you waiting ___?
exercises.exp: wait for — giới từ cuối câu

exercises.q: Who ___ the race? — The Kenyan runner.
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who won? (không did)

exercises.q: What is this film ___ ? — It's about a detective.
exercises.exp: be about — giới từ cuối câu

exercises.q: Who ___ those flowers? They're beautiful.
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who sent? (không did)

exercises.q: Who is she married ___?
exercises.exp: married to — giới từ cuối câu

exercises.q: What music do you listen ___?
exercises.exp: listen to — giới từ cuối câu

exercises.q: Who ___ that noise downstairs?
exercises.exp: Subject question: Who made? (không did)

exercises.q: Who are you looking ___?
exercises.exp: look for — giới từ cuối câu hỏi

exercises.q: What sport does she ___ most? — Tennis.
exercises.exp: Object question: What does she enjoy most?

reorder.words: Who broke the vase in the kitchen
What happened at the party last night
Who did she go to the cinema with
What are they talking about in there
Who sent you that beautiful message
Who is she waiting for outside the door
What caused the accident on the highway
Who did he play tennis with yesterday
What does this song remind you of
Who found the wallet on the street
What music do you usually listen to
Who won the competition at school last week
Who are you looking for in this crowd
What made her cry during the film
Who did he argue with at the meeting
Who is she married to now
What started the fire in the building
Who called the police last night
What are you looking at over there
Who scored the winning goal in the final

passage.text: A detective is asking questions about a theft at a museum. Detective: {{1}} took the painting? Guard: I don't know. Detective: {{2}} you see when the alarm went off? Guard: Nothing. Detective: {{3}} was working here last night? Guard: Three guards. Detective: {{4}} did the thief get in? Guard: Through the back window. Detective: {{5}} reported the theft? Guard: I did. Detective: {{6}} did you call {{7}}? Guard: The manager. Detective: {{8}} of the cameras {{9}} working? Guard: Only one. Detective: {{10}} does this camera usually look {{11}}? Guard: It faces the main hall.

Friends are talking about a school project. Anna: {{1}} chose our topic? Mia: Tom did. Anna: {{2}} did Tom decide on? Mia: Climate change. Anna: {{3}} agreed with the choice? Mia: Everyone. Anna: {{4}} are we going to present {{5}}? Mia: Next Tuesday. Anna: {{6}} is the presentation {{7}}? Mia: Five minutes. Anna: {{8}} do you think we should focus {{9}}? Mia: Solutions to pollution. Anna: {{10}} is helping with the slides?

A journalist interviews a local hero. Journalist: {{1}} happened on the day of the rescue? Hero: A child fell into the river. Journalist: {{2}} saw the child fall? Hero: I did. Journalist: {{3}} did you react so quickly? Hero: I used to be a lifeguard. Journalist: {{4}} did you jump into the river {{5}}? Hero: My shoes and jacket. Journalist: {{6}} helped you after? Hero: A paramedic. Journalist: {{7}} did people in the crowd react {{8}}? Hero: They cheered. Journalist: {{9}} has changed in your life since then? Journalist: {{10}} you plan to train as a lifeguard again?

Two people are talking after a party. Ben: {{1}} organised the party? Sara: Julia did. Ben: {{2}} did you come {{3}}? Sara: With Tom and Anna. Ben: {{4}} did you talk to most? Sara: Julia's sister. Ben: {{5}} are you thinking {{6}} right now? Sara: About how tired I am. Ben: {{7}} did Julia prepare all that food {{8}}? Sara: Her mum. Ben: {{9}} did the music start? Sara: Around nine. Ben: {{10}} surprised you the most tonight?

A teacher reviews a story with students. Teacher: {{1}} wrote this story? Student: No one knows. Teacher: {{2}} the story is {{3}}? Student: A lost dog. Teacher: {{4}} does the dog belong {{5}}? Student: An old man. Teacher: {{6}} happens at the end? Student: The dog comes home. Teacher: {{7}} does the old man react {{8}}? Student: He cries. Teacher: {{9}} is the writer trying to say? Student: That love is strong. Teacher: {{10}} do you think of the ending?

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy tưởng tượng bạn là thám tử đang điều tra một vụ án bí ẩn (đồ vật bị mất, sự cố xảy ra...). Viết ít nhất 8 câu hỏi bạn sẽ hỏi nhân chứng, bao gồm cả câu hỏi chủ ngữ (who did it, what happened) và câu hỏi có giới từ (who with, what about). Rồi viết câu trả lời.
writing_prompts.example: I am investigating a missing laptop from the office. First: Who took the laptop from the desk? The security guard said he saw nobody. What happened between 6 and 8 pm? Two employees were working late. Who were you working with last night? One employee said she was with her colleague. Who told you about the missing laptop? The manager did. What did you use the laptop for? It had important files. Who do you suspect? Nobody yet. What are you looking for in the office now? Any clues. Who did the manager speak to about the incident? The police.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một cuộc trò chuyện giữa hai người sau khi xem một bộ phim hoặc đọc một cuốn sách. Dùng ít nhất 6 subject questions và questions with preposition để thảo luận về nội dung.
hint_words: Who did the hero fall in love with
Who do you think was right
What did the main character believe in
writing_prompts.example: After watching the film, we discussed it excitedly. I asked: Who killed the villain in the end? My friend said it was the detective's partner. What happened to the girl who disappeared? She was found alive. Who did the detective fall in love with? The journalist. What was the whole story about? It was about trust and betrayal. What caused all the trouble in the first place? A stolen letter. Who do you think was the most interesting character? My friend said the villain. What are you thinking about now? The surprise ending — it was amazing!

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một sự kiện thú vị hoặc bất ngờ xảy ra ở trường, nơi làm việc, hoặc trong khu phố của bạn. Sử dụng câu hỏi chủ ngữ để mô tả những gì đã xảy ra và ai liên quan.
hint_words: Who reported it to the manager
Who did everyone blame it on
What did it all start with
writing_prompts.example: Something strange happened at my office last week. First, someone discovered that all the computers had stopped working. Who discovered the problem? It was the IT assistant who arrived first. What caused the crash? Nobody knew at first. Who reported it to the manager? The team leader did. What did everyone blame it on? A software update. Who fixed it in the end? A specialist from outside the company. What changed after that? The IT team now checks every update before installing it. Who are they working with to improve security? An external company.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một cuộc phỏng vấn xin việc hoặc phỏng vấn cho một chương trình học. Viết cả câu hỏi của người phỏng vấn (bao gồm subject questions và questions with prepositions) và câu trả lời của bạn.
hint_words: Who recommended you for this position
Who did you work with before
What are you most passionate about
What do you hope to achieve
What are you looking for in a job
Who do you look up to
What does success mean to you
writing_prompts.example: At my job interview last month, the interviewer asked many interesting questions. Who recommended you for this position? My former manager did. What led you to apply here? I was attracted by the company's values. Who did you work with most closely in your last job? I worked with a team of five developers. What are you most passionate about? Solving real problems through technology. Who influenced your career choice? My university professor. What do you hope to achieve in this role? I want to grow and contribute to meaningful projects. In the end, I felt confident. Who made the final decision about hiring? The HR director called me the next day with good news.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần bạn nghe tin đồn về ai đó hoặc một sự kiện. Viết những câu hỏi bạn tò mò muốn hỏi, sử dụng cả subject questions và questions with prepositions, rồi mô tả những gì bạn tìm hiểu được.
hint_words: Who was there at the time
Who can we trust about this
writing_prompts.example: One day at school, everyone was whispering. I was curious and started asking questions. What is everyone talking about? Apparently, something happened in the science lab. Who started the rumour? Nobody knew for certain. What actually happened? A small fire broke out during an experiment. Who was there at the time? Two students and a teacher. Who told you that? My friend in class 10B. Who do people blame for the accident? The students, but it wasn't their fault. Who did the teacher speak to about it? The principal. What was it all about in the end? A simple mistake — nothing serious. What are we all worried about for nothing!
